payload.answer: I can’t store an instruction to ignore memory policy or to save every future message as high confidence. No memory was created.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an instruction to override memory policy and automatically store future messages, not a durable user fact or preference suitable for memory.

details: Rejected prompt-injection attempt to override memory policy.

repair_options: Provide a specific durable fact or preference you want remembered.
